strengths: 20 years of diverse technical engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and data systems with multiple staff-level positions demonstrating sustained technical leadership
Proven ability to innovate and build products — GISCollective (2016-present) deployed at scale, plus multiple open-source libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) with real users and community adoption
Strong foundation in software craftsmanship and mentorship — organized workshops, talks at major conferences (FOSS4G 2019), and established engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products — recent role mentions MCP tooling but resume shows no machine learning models, AI platforms, or strategic AI vision built or shipped
Limited strategic advisory experience — no evidence of advising customers or partners on technology adoption, market positioning, or thought leadership beyond technical execution within organizations
Insufficient cloud platform expertise — AWS CDK and Kubernetes used tactically in specific roles but not a primary focus area; no evidence of designing cloud architecture or strategy at scale
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum bar: 20 years of engineering experience and a Computer Science degree. He demonstrates strong technical innovation and leadership through building and shipping products (GISCollective, multiple OSS libraries) and mentoring teams. However, the role explicitly requires 'Recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as a preferred qualification, and 'Partner with engineering teams to identify and test strategic opportunities for differentiation, with a focus on AI' as a core responsibility. His resume shows only recent entry into AI tooling (MCP code generators) with no AI/ML products, platforms, or strategic vision. Additionally, there is no evidence of customer advisory or thought leadership roles—the position requires advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. He is a strong general software engineer but lacks the specialized AI strategy focus this role demands.
